subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! During the days of war, when the dark cloud of conflict hath encompassed the horizons and restricted the expanse for all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در ایام جنگ ابر سیاه حرب عرصه را بر جمیع تنگ نمود مخابره
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @praise and encouragement, @war and peace, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
